where.if: AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sub_title_pc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sub_title_mo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.sql: id ,title ,sub_title_pc ,sub_title_mo ,icon_image ,descript1 ,descript2 ,descript3 ,descript4 ,descript5 ,use_yn ,order_no ,create_date ,create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,modified_date ,modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist WHERE mng_id = a.id) planLisCnt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_mng a WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_recomplan_mng ( id, title, sub_title_pc, sub_title_mo, icon_image, descript1, descript2, descript3, descript4, descript5, use_yn, order_no, create_date, create_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{subTitlePc}, #{subTitleMo}, #{iconImage}, #{descript1}, #{descript2}, #{descript3}, #{descript4}, #{descript5}, #{useYn}, #{orderNo}, NOW(), #{createId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_pmb_recomplan_mng SET modified_date = NOW(),
title = #{title},
sub_title_pc = #{subTitlePc},
sub_title_mo = #{subTitleMo},
icon_image = #{iconImage},
descript1 = #{descript1},
descript2 = #{descript2},
descript3 = #{descript3},
descript4 = #{descript4},
descript5 = #{descript5},
use_yn = #{useYn},
order_no = #{orderNo},
modified_id = #{modifiedId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql: a.id ,a.plan_id ,a.mng_id ,a.order_no ,b.plan_name as planName ,c.title as recomTitle ,b.mno ,GET_COMPANY_NM(b.host) AS planHostNm ,b.plan_type as planType ,b.sup_data_val as supDataVal ,b.daily_data as dailyData ,b.sup_qos as supQos ,b.normal_price as normalPrice ,b.sale_price as salePrice ,b.after_price as afterPrice ,b.promotion_period as promotionPeriod
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_recomplan_mng c WHERE a.plan_id = b.id AND a.mng_id = c.id

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_recomplan_mng c WHERE a.plan_id = b.id AND a.mng_id = c.id AND a.id=#{id}
